# Extracting the smoothed part of a twoStepsBenchmark

The function `smoothed.part` returns the smoothed part of a
[twoStepsBenchmark](https://inseefr.github.io/disaggR/reference/twoStepsBenchmark.md).
It derives from the residuals of the aggregated regression, with some
differences :

- it is eventually integrated if `include.differenciation=TRUE`.

- it is extrapolated to match the domain window.

- it is smoothed using the
  [bflSmooth](https://inseefr.github.io/disaggR/reference/bflSmooth.md)
  function.

## Usage

``` r
smoothed.part(object)
```

## Arguments

- object:

  a twoStepsBenchmark object.

## Value

a time series

## Examples

``` r
benchmark <- twoStepsBenchmark(turnover,construction); smoothed.part(benchmark)
#>               Jan          Feb          Mar          Apr          May
```
